---
title: "Comparison of TCRβ frequencies across different samples from the TIL15 patient"
author: "Endika Prieto <endikaprieto@vhio.net>"
date: "2026-04-24"
---

# setup

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# --- Load libraries and custom functions ---
source("/Users/endikaprieto/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VHIO/pbl/single_cell/sc_pipeline/scripts/TIL15/setup/setup-m1.R")
# --- Define paths and sample identifiers ---
datapath <- "/Users/endikaprieto/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VHIO/pbl/single_cell/sc_pipeline/patients"
sample <- "TIL15"
folder_data <- "ITAG_AGG_Bulk"
# --- Define data loading path ---
datapath_seqtr <- "/Users/endikaprieto/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VHIO/collabs/Andrea Garcia VHIO/CancerDiscovery_2026/SEQTR/ISF_Rep_2026_00912/"
datapath_reactive <- "/Users/endikaprieto/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VHIO/pbl/single_cell/sc_pipeline/patients/TIL15/ITAG_AGG_Bulk/outs/reactive-clono.txt"
# --- Initialize lists for plot storage ---
plots_list <- list()
```

# data load

```{r}
bulk.data <- list()
samples <- c("AGa0002", "AGa0007", "AGa0008", "AGa0009")
for (i in samples) {
  data_i <- fread(file.path(datapath_seqtr, paste0(i, "-2026-00912_TCRb_repertoire_corrected.txt"))) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Frame == "IN") %>%
    dplyr::mutate(freq = Count / sum(Count)) %>%
    mutate(
      TRBV = TRBV %>%
        str_replace("^hTRBV", "TRBV") %>%
        str_replace("^TRBV0([1-9])", "TRBV\\1")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      TRBJ = TRBJ %>%
        str_replace("^hTRBJ", "TRBJ") %>%
        str_replace("^TRBJ0([1-9])", "TRBJ\\1")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      CDR3_aaseq = str_replace(CDR3_aaseq, ".$", "")
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      TCRb = paste0(CDR3_aaseq, "_", TRBV, "_", TRBJ)
    ) %>%
    select(TCRb, freq) %>%
    arrange(desc(freq)) %>%
    group_by(TCRb) %>%
    summarise(
      freq = sum(freq, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(freq))
  bulk.data[[i]] <- data_i
}
bulk.data.wide <- imap_dfr(bulk.data, ~ mutate(.x, sample = .y)) %>%
  distinct(sample, TCRb, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = sample,
    values_from = freq,
    values_fill = NA_real_
  ) %>%
  rename_with(
    ~ recode(.x,
      AGa0002 = "TIL15_RNA_T",
      AGa0007 = "TIL15_CD8_PD1hi_CD39pos",
      AGa0008 = "TIL_Infusion_Product",
      AGa0009 = "TIL15_PBMCs",
      .default = .x
    )
  )
```

# annot

Reactive TCR

```{r}
annot <- fread(datapath_reactive) %>% as.data.frame()
bulk.data.wide <- bulk.data.wide %>% left_join(annot %>% select(TCRb, TCR.ID, Reactive), by = "TCRb")
set.seed(123)
tcr_ids <- paste0("ID", sprintf("%02d", 1:26))
tcr_colors <- setNames(
  Polychrome::createPalette(
    length(tcr_ids),
    seedcolors = c("#5DA5DA","#F15854","#60BD68","#B276B2")
  ),
  tcr_ids
)
```

# frequency plots

```{r}
cond_levels <- c("TIL15_PBMCs",
                 "TIL15_RNA_T",
                 "TIL_Infusion_Product")
df_long <- bulk.data.wide %>%
  distinct() %>%
  pivot_longer(all_of(cond_levels), names_to = "condition", values_to = "freq") %>%
  mutate(
    was_na = is.na(freq),
    condition = factor(condition, levels = cond_levels)
  )
min_pos   <- df_long %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(freq), freq > 0) %>% summarise(m = min(freq)) %>% pull(m)
floor_val <- min(1e-7, min_pos / 10, na.rm = TRUE)
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(freq_plot = if_else(was_na, floor_val, freq)) %>%
  group_by(TCRb) %>%
  mutate(multi = n_distinct(condition[!was_na]) > 1) %>%
  ungroup()
tcr_ids_present <- sort(unique(na.omit(df_long$TCR.ID)))
tcr_colors_use  <- tcr_colors[names(tcr_colors) %in% tcr_ids_present]
df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(TCR.ID = factor(TCR.ID, levels = names(tcr_colors_use)))
# --- Plot reactive TCRs ---
plot_r <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = condition, y = freq_plot)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    data = df_long %>%
      dplyr::filter(!was_na, freq > 0) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(condition) %>%
      dplyr::filter(dplyr::n() >= 10) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup(),
    aes(y = freq_plot),
    outlier.shape = 16, outlier.size = 0.25,
    width = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.25,
    fill = "grey90",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = df_long %>% dplyr::filter(multi, !is.na(TCR.ID), Reactive == "Yes"),
    aes(group = TCRb, color = TCR.ID, linewidth = !is.na(TCR.ID)),
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_long %>% dplyr::filter(!multi, !was_na, !is.na(TCR.ID), freq > 0, Reactive == "Yes"),
    aes(group = TCRb, color = TCR.ID),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tcr_colors_use, name = "Reactive TCR.ID") +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 0.1, `TRUE` = 0.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1, legend.position = "right") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2, override.aes = list(linewidth = 1))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Frequency", title = "TIL15_Deep_TCRb")
# --- Plot non-reactive TCRs ---
plot_nr <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = condition, y = freq_plot)) +
  geom_boxplot(
    data = df_long %>%
      dplyr::filter(!was_na, freq > 0) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(condition) %>%
      dplyr::filter(dplyr::n() >= 10) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup(),
    aes(y = freq_plot),
    outlier.shape = 16, outlier.size = 0.25,
    width = 0.5,
    linewidth = 0.25,
    fill = "grey90",
    color = "black"
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = df_long %>% dplyr::filter(multi, !is.na(TCR.ID), Reactive == "No"),
    aes(group = TCRb, color = TCR.ID, linewidth = !is.na(TCR.ID)),
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_long %>% dplyr::filter(!multi, !was_na, !is.na(TCR.ID), freq > 0, Reactive == "No"),
    aes(group = TCRb, color = TCR.ID),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = tcr_colors_use, name = "Non-Reactive TCR.ID") +
  scale_linewidth_manual(values = c(`FALSE` = 0.1, `TRUE` = 0.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_log10() +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1, legend.position = "right") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2, override.aes = list(linewidth = 1))) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Frequency", title = "Bulk_TIL15_Non-Reactive")
plots_list[["TIL15_Bulk_TCR_Frequency"]] <- wrap_plots(plot_r, plot_nr, ncol = 2)
```

# save

```{r}
# --- Save plots ---
dir.create(file.path(datapath, sample, folder_data, "plots"), recursive = FALSE)
for (i in names(plots_list)) {
  outfile <- file.path(datapath, sample, folder_data, "plots", paste0(i, ".pdf"))
  tryCatch({
    pdf(file = outfile, width = 297 / 15, height = 210 / 15)
    print(plots_list[[i]])
    dev.off()
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Error en plot: ", i)
    message("  ", e$message)
    if (dev.cur() != 1) {
      try(dev.off(), silent = TRUE)
    }
  })
}
```
